content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility (Vol: 35.0%) with extremely narrow participation (Breadth: 1/8 sectors positive). Volatility score 0; breadth negative signal keeps market cautious.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Banking & Finance is the lone leader: AKBNK (1W: +1.93% | 1M: -12.85%) RECOVERY; ISCTR (1W: +2.54% | 1M: -6.92%) RECOVERY; GARAN (1W: +1.83% | 1M: -7.24%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Energy & Chemicals and Technology & Telecom are weakest: SASA (1W: -4.94% | 1M: -29.38%) BELOW TREND; KONTR (1W: -20.00% | 1M: -40.33%) BELOW TREND; GUBRF (1W: -12.92% | 1M: -23.85%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
ALARK (1W: +5.48% | 1M: +4.96%) ABOVE TREND; ISCTR (1W: +2.54% | 1M: -6.92%) RECOVERY; AKBNK (1W: +1.93% | 1M: -12.85%) RECOVERY; GARAN (1W: +1.83% | 1M: -7.24%) RECOVERY; YKBNK (1W: +1.22% | 1M: -12.39%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -20.00% | 1M: -40.33%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -16.63% | 1M: -19.56%) BELOW TREND; GUBRF (1W: -12.92% | 1M: -23.85%) BELOW TREND; PETKM (1W: -11.49% | 1M: -23.68%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -9.17% | 1M: -15.95%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -20.00% | 1M: -40.33%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -16.63% | 1M: -19.56%) BELOW TREND; GUBRF (1W: -12.92% | 1M: -23.85%) BELOW TREND; PETKM (1W: -11.49% | 1M: -23.68%) BELOW TREND; ALARK (1W: +5.48% | 1M: +4.96%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks show short-term recovery but weak 1M performance; ISCTR (1W: +2.54% | 1M: -6.92%) RECOVERY, AKBNK (1W: +1.93% | 1M: -12.85%) RECOVERY, GARAN (1W: +1.83% | 1M: -7.24%) RECOVERY while TSKB (1W: -0.43% | 1M: -6.60%) BELOW TREND — trade selective on earnings/asset quality.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry is broadly weak: KRDMD (1W: -5.93% | 1M: -13.77%) BELOW TREND, VESTL (1W: -6.64% | 1M: -17.70%) BELOW TREND, EREGL (1W: -4.12% | 1M: -4.15%) BELOW TREND; construction mixed with ALARK (1W: +5.48% | 1M: +4.96%) ABOVE TREND versus TKFEN (1W: -9.04% | 1M: -12.80%) BELOW TREND.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Sector under heavy pressure and acting as the main market drag: SASA (1W: -4.94% | 1M: -29.38%) BELOW TREND, PETKM (1W: -11.49% | 1M: -23.68%) BELOW TREND, TUPRS (1W: -1.30% | 1M: -9.52%) BELOW TREND — avoid broad exposure until breadth improves.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral stance: underweight weak cyclicals and energy, overweight selective banking names and momentum construction (ALARK) while keeping cash for confirmed breadth improvement; tighten stops on largest drawdowns and use intraday strength in RECOVERY banks to trim/improve cost.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
ALARK (1W: +5.48% | 1M: +4.96%) ABOVE TREND for continuation; ISCTR (1W: +2.54% | 1M: -6.92%) RECOVERY and AKBNK (1W: +1.93% | 1M: -12.85%) RECOVERY for bank-led bounce; KONTR (1W: -20.00% | 1M: -40.33%) BELOW TREND as a volatility candidate.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for leadership attempts, Energy & Chemicals for downside risk and spillover, and Technology & Telecom for potential short squeezes or further weakness.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 technical reaction to the 20-day moving average for short-term bias; failure to reclaim it keeps risk-off tilt, a decisive break below recent swing lows accelerates selling. Macro/catalyst watchlist: CPI prints, CBT commentary on FX/liquidity, global risk appetite and oil price moves, and major BIST50 earnings releases.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
NEUTRAL regime: normal volatility but very narrow breadth (1/8 sectors positive) keeps market fragile. Short-term opportunities in RECOVERY banks and ALARK; main risk remains deep weakness in Energy, Tech and select heavy industrials that can widen market sell-off.
